overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a post-apocalyptic action-adventure game showing a character navigating through a flooded, overgrown urban wasteland. The character emerges from water, explores abandoned concrete buildings, and traverses submerged streets in a misty, derelict city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with derelict buildings

events.description: character rises from prone position in shallow water to standing
approaching the collapsed entrance of the abandoned concrete building

agents.ego_description: emerging from floodwater and walking through shallow water toward a collapsed building entrance

entered.detail: multi-story abandoned apartment building with broken windows and overgrown vines
rusted metal and concrete bridge structure collapsed across the street
shallow floodwater covering the ground with reflections of buildings
tall pine trees visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The character lies in shallow floodwater in a derelict urban area, then rises and walks toward a collapsed building entrance. A derelict concrete building looms on the left while a collapsed pedestrian bridge spans the background, all under an overcast, hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark abandoned building interior with debris

events.description: entering the dark interior of the collapsed building through a broken archway
passing a white mannequin figure standing on a concrete ledge to the left

agents.ego_description: cautiously navigating through dark corridors and rooms, crouching briefly near a mannequin figure

notable_agents.action: white mannequin figure standing motionless on a concrete ledge inside the building

entered.detail: weathered concrete walls with cracks and water damage
piles of broken concrete, rebar, and rubble scattered on the floor
tall empty shelving units against the right wall
open doorway leading to darker interior rooms

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark, ruined interior of the abandoned building, moving through debris-filled corridors. A white mannequin figure stands motionless on a ledge to the left as the character passes by empty metal shelves and broken concrete walls in the low-light environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined building terrace overlooking flooded district

events.description: exiting the dark building into the overgrown exterior ruins
climbing over rubble and broken concrete sections while navigating the ruins

agents.ego_description: navigating through exterior ruins, climbing over debris and walking along a broken terrace with views of the flooded district below

entered.detail: collapsed terrace with cracked concrete and missing sections
building walls completely covered in dense green ivy and vines
wide view of the flooded urban area visible through broken walls
narrow dirt trail leading through the ruins toward the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the character traverses the overgrown exterior ruins with ivy-covered walls and broken concrete terraces. The path leads along the edge of the structure with views of the flooded district below, navigating through dense vegetation and rubble.

scene_state.functional_zone: submerged urban plaza with abandoned vehicles

events.description: stepping from dry land into deep floodwater of the submerged plaza
transitioning from wading to swimming as the water deepens

agents.ego_description: wading and swimming through deep floodwater toward submerged vehicles in the distance

entered.detail: partially submerged white vehicles sitting in the floodwater
green lily pads and aquatic plants floating on the water surface
massive rock formation at the water's edge
tall abandoned building visible through the mist across the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters deep floodwater in a submerged urban plaza, swimming past lily pads toward abandoned cars visible in the distance. The water is calm and murky, surrounded by overgrown banks and the silhouettes of distant derelict buildings under the gray overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate urban wasteland into the dark ruins of a building before emerging into a submerged city plaza. It begins with the character rising from shallow floodwater and walking toward a collapsed building entrance under a hazy, overcast sky. As the character enters the structure, the scene shifts into a low-light interior of debris-filled corridors and empty metal shelves, passing a motionless white mannequin on a ledge. The camera then follows the character back outside, navigating through ivy-covered walls and broken concrete terraces that overlook the flooded district below. Finally, the path leads away from the ruins and into deep, murky water, where the character swims past lily pads toward abandoned cars and distant derelict silhouettes.
